name: Sawang Export Public Company Limited
summary: Sawang Export Public Company Limited engages in the manufacture and distribution of precious stones and jewelry in Thailand, Europe, Australia, the United States, and internationally. The company offers jewelry accessories, including rings, pendants, earrings, and necklaces made with 8k, 9k, 10k, 14k, and 18k gold or silver consisting of diamond and color stones. It also provides diamond, precious, semi-precious, and created stones; color stones, such as rubies, and natural blue and yellow sapphires, as well as synthetic stones; and gold and silver jewelry sets. The company offers its products through department and online stores under the Beawelry and Silver Star 7 brands. It also exports its products. Sawang Export Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1972 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
